content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.vtuber.process_supervisor
FILE: cosmos/integration/vtuber/process_supervisor.py (438 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Process Supervisor - Watchdog for FFmpeg and streaming subprocesses

Provides:
- Health monitoring for subprocess health (stdout/stderr activity, CPU usage)
- Auto-restart with exponential backoff on crashes
- Zombie process reaping
- Resource usage monitoring
- Graceful shutdown cascade

CLASSES:
- ProcessState(Enum)
- ProcessHealth: Health metrics for a supervised process
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- ProcessSupervisor: Supervises a subprocess with health monitoring and auto-restart.

Usage:
    sup
  Methods: def process(self) -> Optional[subprocess.Popen]
  Methods: def health(self) -> ProcessHealth
  Methods: def is_running(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def start(self) -> Optional[subprocess.Popen]
  Methods: async def stop(self, timeout: float=10.0)
  Methods: async def restart(self)
  Methods: def write_stdin(self, data: bytes) -> bool
- SupervisorPool: Manages multiple ProcessSupervisors for the VTuber system.

Typical supervisors:
  Methods: def add(self, supervisor: ProcessSupervisor)
  Methods: def get(self, name: str) -> Optional[ProcessSupervisor]
  Methods: async def start_all(self)
  Methods: async def stop_all(self, timeout: float=15.0)
  Methods: def health_report(self) -> Dict[str, Dict]
  Methods: def all_healthy(self) -> bool
